projects.title: AI Engineer Portfolio Website
projects.description: Built and iterated this portfolio as a product-grade system rather than a static resume page. The work included designing a scalable data-driven structure, integrating a dedicated backend API, and reshaping the frontend for clear narrative flow across technical depth, project outcomes, and role readiness. I focused on responsive behavior, strong information hierarchy, and clean visual storytelling so each section is easy to scan while still preserving detail for deeper review.
projects.highlight: Converted a basic profile site into a structured engineering narrative with reusable data models and scalable section architecture.

projects.title: Customer-Support AI Chat Portal
projects.description: Designed a serverless AI support platform that combines ticket ingestion, summarization, and routing into a unified operational workflow. The system integrates event-driven backend services with model-assisted triage to reduce manual bottlenecks and speed up handoffs for human agents. I worked on architecture decisions around reliability, observability, and deployment automation, ensuring updates could ship safely while preserving response quality under load.
projects.highlight: Connected LLM-assisted triage with production support operations through a deployment-ready serverless architecture.

projects.title: Forensics Detective
projects.description: Built an applied media-forensics investigation platform focused on identifying manipulation artifacts and supporting evidence-driven analysis workflows. The project combines backend processing, interactive frontend exploration, and AI-assisted guidance to help users navigate forensic checks, compare media signals, and interpret outputs in a structured investigation pipeline.
projects.highlight: Designed as a practical forensic-analysis tool with guided workflows and interpretable output surfaces.

projects.title: Skin Cancer Detection
projects.description: Developed a deep learning pipeline for benign vs malignant lesion classification using transfer learning with multiple CNN backbones. Beyond model training, I focused on end-to-end experimentation discipline: preprocessing strategy, augmentation choices, validation methodology, and leaderboard-driven iteration. The project strengthened my ability to balance model accuracy with practical engineering concerns such as reproducibility and interpretable evaluation.
projects.highlight: Iterative transfer-learning workflow that combined medical-imaging rigor with practical model-engineering decisions.

projects.title: Deep Learning-Based ETo Forecasting
projects.description: Built a hybrid LSTM-CNN forecasting system for reference evapotranspiration using long-range weather histories from hundreds of locations. I handled feature preparation, temporal modeling, error analysis, and benchmark comparison to improve forecasting quality across lead times. The project emphasized translating research-style modeling into operationally useful signals for agriculture and environmental planning, with careful attention to generalization and stability.
projects.highlight: Combined sequence modeling and spatial signal learning to improve practical forecasting quality at scale.
